summary: Tested Housekeeping module - Reports, Found Items, Categories APIs and UI. GET endpoints working (13/17 passed), POST endpoints for reports/found-items failing with 500 error due to ObjectId validation bug in NestJS backend.

critical.issue: Returns 500 - BSONError: input must be a 24 character hex string. category_id validation fails when non-ObjectId string is passed
Returns 500 - BSONError: input must be a 24 character hex string. category_id validation fails when non-ObjectId string is passed

passed_tests: GET /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/reports - Returns list of reports (200 OK)
GET /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/found-items - Returns list of found items (200 OK)
GET /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/settings/categories/found-items - Returns found item categories (200 OK)
Frontend: Réception view with Plan Chambres, Répartition, Signalement, Objets Trouvés tabs
Frontend: ReportsTab component renders with stats and report list
Frontend: FoundItemsTab component renders with stats and item list
Frontend: Direction view with Tableau de bord and Configuration tabs
Frontend: CategoriesConfig component renders with 10 report categories and 9 found item categories
action_items: FIX: In report.service.ts line 31, add validation for category_id before converting to ObjectId - check if it's a valid 24-char hex string or make it optional
FIX: In found-item.service.ts line 29, add same validation for category_id
SUGGESTION: Use try-catch around ObjectId conversion or use mongoose.isValidObjectId() check
critical_code_review_comments: report.service.ts:31 - new Types.ObjectId(dto.category_id) fails when category_id is not a valid ObjectId format
found-item.service.ts:29 - Same issue with ObjectId conversion
Both services should validate category_id format before conversion or make it optional
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data: 1 report (Ampoule grillée - room 101), 1 found item (iPhone noir - room 205), 10 report categories, 9 found item categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend POST endpoints for reports and found-items need ObjectId validation fix. All GET endpoints work. Frontend UI fully functional with all tabs rendering correctly. Categories CRUD works. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_housekeeping_module.py

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In report.service.ts and found-item.service.ts, the create() method attempts to convert category_id to MongoDB ObjectId using new Types.ObjectId(dto.category_id) without validating if the input is a valid 24-character hex string
reproduction_steps: 1. POST to /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/reports with category_id that is not a valid ObjectId (e.g., 'test-category-1')
2. Backend throws BSONError: input must be a 24 character hex string
rca_of_the_issue.suggested_fix: Add validation: category_id: dto.category_id && Types.ObjectId.isValid(dto.category_id) ? new Types.ObjectId(dto.category_id) : undefined
